# Pull Request Checklist

## Summary


## Checks

- [ ] Linked GitHub issue.
- [ ] Code follows project structure.
- [ ] Ordinary files use camelCase naming.
- [ ] No generated files committed.
- [ ] No npm lockfile added.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] Screenshots added for UI changes.
- [ ] Light/dark mode checked for UI changes.
- [ ] Mobile/tablet/desktop checked for UI changes.
- [ ] Tenant authorization checked for server changes.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
